title: Japanese Gyoza Chicken Bites
description: A crispy and delicious Japanese-inspired appetizer made with chicken, gyoza, and a hint of deep-fried magic.
instructions: Preheat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (175°C).
Prepare the breading station by mixing the soy sauce, sesame oil, ginger, and garlic in a shallow dish.
Cut the breaded chicken breast into small bite-sized pieces.
Dip each chicken piece into the breading mixture, coating both sides evenly.
Wrap each chicken piece with a gyoza wrapper, sealing the edges with a little water.
Deep-fry the gyoza chicken bites in batches until golden brown and crispy.
Drain the excess oil on paper towels.
Serve hot with chopped green onions and your favorite dipping sauce.
